name: M9 刺刀（★） | 澄澈之水
nameZh: M9 刺刀（★） | 澄澈之水
descriptionEn: This is the M-9 bayonet. Originally intended to be mounted on a rifle, it is also well suited to close-quarters combat. It has been painted using a blue camo hydrographic. Ours is a world of intrigue...but sometimes camouflage is meant to be seen - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 这是 M-9 刺刀。起初是装在步枪上面的，其同时还非常适合近距离作战。 这把武器蓝色迷彩花纹进行了涂装。 我们的世界充满了阴谋暗算… 但有时用作伪装的迷彩就是拿来炫的 - 军火商布兹
